description: Sector overlay for French airlines, airports, aviation operators, ground handlers, maintenance organizations, training organizations, and aviation service providers.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Aviation. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: DGAC/EASA licence, certificate, or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for air operator certificate, DGAC/EASA approval, licence, certificate, or aviation authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Safety management or operational safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety management system, occurrence reporting, risk assessment, airworthiness, maintenance, or operational safety controls.

rules.title: Passenger rights or complaints evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for passenger-rights disclosures, complaints, compensation, delay, cancellation, denied boarding, or assistance evidence.

rules.title: Passenger/crew data-protection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notices, passenger data, crew records, biometric/identity processing, or GDPR controls.
